title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMAmenity
description: A facility or amenity from OpenStreetMap tagged with amenity=*. Represents places of public or private use such as restaurants, schools, hospitals, banks, etc

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMAmenity

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

amenityType.description: Property. The OSM amenity tag classifying the facility. Enum:'restaurant, cafe, bar, fast_food, pub, ice_cream, biergarten, food_court, school, kindergarten, university, college, library, music_school, driving_school, hospital, clinic, pharmacy, doctors, dentist, veterinary, bank, atm, bureau_de_change, post_office, police, fire_station, place_of_worship, courthouse, townhall, fuel, parking, bicycle_parking, car_sharing, bus_station, taxi, toilets, bench, drinking_water, fountain, waste_basket, waste_disposal, recycling'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:amenity'

takeaway.description: Property. Indicates if the food establishment offers takeaway. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:takeaway'

delivery.description: Property. Indicates if the facility offers delivery service. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:delivery'

outdoorSeating.description: Property. Indicates if outdoor seating is available. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:outdoor_seating'

capacity.description: Property. Maximum capacity of people for the amenity. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:capacity'

fee.description: Property. Indicates whether a fee must be paid to use or enter the amenity. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:fee'

openingHours.description: Property. Opening hours of the amenity in OSM format. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:opening_hours'

phone.description: Property. Phone number for the amenity. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:phone'

address.description: Property. Address of the amenity, structured following schema.org PostalAddress

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources about this item
